title: Immersive Weapon Draw Sounds
description: This mod adds sounds for drawing weapons.
body:
## Immersive Weapon Draw Sounds

This small but impactful mod adds a layer of realism and immersion to your gameplay by providing unique and satisfying sounds for drawing various weapons.

Features:

• Authentic Weapon Sounds: Experience the distinct sounds of drawing swords, daggers, axes, halberds, bows, pikes, shovels, and more.

• Mount & Blade Inspiration: Some sounds are meticulously sourced from the beloved Mount & Blade: Warband, bringing a familiar and beloved touch to your game.

• Epic Knights Compatibility: Seamlessly integrate this mod with the popular Epic Knights mod, enhancing your medieval combat experience.

Why You'll Love It:

• Increased Immersion: The distinct weapon draw sounds create a more believable and engaging combat experience.

• Enhanced Realism: Hear the satisfying clang of a sword being unsheathed or the satisfying "thunk" of a battleaxe being drawn.

• Greater Detail: The sounds add a layer of depth and detail to your gameplay, making the world feel more alive.

Get ready to experience your favorite weapons like never before.

**Created with MCreator**
